changes.title: MAX_APPEARANCE_PRESETS = 10
changes.description: Establishes a hard limit of 10 named appearance presets per user, enforced on write by saveAppearancePreset(). Prevents runaway appearance.json growth from large nested arrays.

changes.title: _generatePresetId()
changes.description: Generates short unique preset IDs of the form p-{base36timestamp}-{4randomchars}. Stable enough for the use case (no two presets created in the same millisecond by the same user) and compact for JSON storage.

changes.title: listAppearancePresets(uid) + getAppearancePreset(uid, id)
changes.description: listAppearancePresets returns the presets[] array from the TTL cache (empty array if absent). getAppearancePreset finds a single preset by ID. Both are synchronous read-only helpers — no network calls.

changes.title: createAppearancePreset(name, overrides)
changes.description: Snapshots the current _appearanceDraft into a preset object with a generated ID, name, createdAt/updatedAt timestamps, and isPublic:false. The nested presets[] field is stripped from the snapshot to avoid infinite nesting. Returns the preset object without writing to cloud — caller decides when to persist.

changes.title: saveAppearancePreset(uid, presetObj)
changes.description: Upserts a preset into the presets[] array in appearance.json and writes to cloud via saveUserAppearance(). Updates updatedAt on modify, appends on create (max 10). Throws a descriptive error if the limit is reached.

changes.title: deleteAppearancePreset(uid, presetId)
changes.description: Removes a preset by ID from the presets[] array and persists the change via saveUserAppearance(). Idempotent — if the preset ID doesn't exist the array is written unchanged.

changes.title: applyAppearancePreset(uid, presetId)
changes.description: Copies a preset's appearance fields into the active _appearanceDraft via updateAppearanceDraft(). Does NOT commit — the user must still call commitAppearanceDraft() or trigger the save from the UI (v1.0.0.9). Throws if the preset ID is not found in the cache.
